query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total, MIN(periodoConcessivoFim) as oldest_concessivo, MAX(periodoConcessivoFim) as newest_concessivo FROM vacation_periods WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC;
